'''Corvastan Benelex''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and entrepreneur in the times of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Corvastan Benelex operated as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and contracted to rescue the son of the president of [[Drearian Defense Conglomerate/Legends|Drearian Defense Conglomerate]],<ref name="GG10" /> [[Mardu Avoa]],<ref name="BHC" /> from [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian slavers]]. Although he killed the ringleaders, Benelex suffered a career-ending injury.<ref name="GG10" /> While recovering in a DDC medical facility,<ref name="BHC" /> Benelex decided to turn the situation to his advantage. He met with the vice-president,<ref name="GG10" /> [[Shiko Tanderris]],<ref name="BHC" /> and requested a loan of two million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and concessions on arms sales from the company. [[House Benelex]] was created with a specialty in kidnap retrieval.<ref name="GG10" />

House Benelex was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Paqualis III/Legends|Paqualis III]] and operated throughout the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], the [[Fellwe sector/Legends|Fellwe]], [[Ehosiq sector/Legends|Ehosiq]], and [[Lostar sector/Legends|Lostar sectors]] of the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]], and the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], House Benelex had been in operation for twelve [[Standard year/Legends|years]] and were a serious rival to [[House Tresario]].<ref name="GG10" />
